plugin.name: Smart File Organizer
plugin.description: Move root-level files into extension-based or date-based folders, with rollback support.
title: Smart File Organizer
description: Organize root-level files by extension or last modified date, then reverse the operation later using the saved undo registry.
mode.label: Mode
summary.done: Moved {count} files and wrote an undo registry to {path}.
dialog.missing.title: Missing Input
error.no_files: No root-level files were found in the selected directory.
error.no_undo: No undo registry was found in the selected directory.
error.empty_undo: Undo registry exists but is empty.
